market_pulse: Competitive Vegas venues showing strong DJ lineups and content activity through month-end; OMNIA and Hakkasan pushing talent announcements, Zouk commanding high engagement on Resortsworld platform, no urgent disruptions in LIV social presence.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA, Hakkasan, and Zouk posting weekly DJ lineups (6/19-6/27). LIV's social presence not showing equivalent cadence of upcoming talent drops.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Increase DJ/talent announcement posts to 2-3x weekly during June; coordinate with talent roster and push to all platforms (IG, TT, TikTok).

content_gaps.description: Competitor venues are seeing strong UGC on TikTok (outfit guides, night recaps, nightlife tips). LIV content presence is lower in organic user mentions.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch #LIVBeachTuesday or #LIVNightEscape hashtag campaign with influencer seeding; incentivize UGC via repost and feature strategy.

content_gaps.description: Competitors using countdown content, teaser posts, and BTS (behind-the-scenes) prior to major events. LIV could increase cadence.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create 48-72hr countdown reels for weekend events; feature staff/bartender prep footage and exclusive previews.
